stories.title: Package Infrastructure and Type System
stories.description: Update Package.swift for iOS 13+ and Swift-only target with testTarget. Create all 9 type system Swift files (AvoEventSchemaType base class + 6 leaf types + AvoList + AvoObject). Delete the types/ subdirectory ObjC files (18 .h/.m files). AvoEventSchemaType provides name(), isEqual(_:), hash, description. AvoList.subtypes is NSMutableSet, AvoObject.fields is NSMutableDictionary. AvoObject.name() uses guard/as? for error tolerance. All classes have @objc public declarations inheriting from NSObject or AvoEventSchemaType.
acceptanceCriteria: Package.swift contains .iOS(.v13) and a testTarget named AvoInspectorTests
All 9 type Swift files exist in Sources/AvoInspector/
Every type class has @objc public class declaration inheriting from NSObject or AvoEventSchemaType
AvoEventSchemaType has name(), isEqual(_:), hash, description implementations
AvoList.subtypes is NSMutableSet and AvoObject.fields is NSMutableDictionary
AvoObject.name() uses guard/as? (not force-unwraps) for error tolerance
No .h or .m files remain in Sources/AvoInspector/types/
swift build succeeds
stories.testPattern: Type correctness verified in Story 7 (SimpleTypeSchemaExtractionTests, DictionarySchemaExtractionTests, ListSchemaExtractionTests)

stories.title: Core Utilities (Storage, Guid, Utils, AnonymousId)
stories.description: Migrate the small utility modules: AvoStorage (protocol with @objc(setItem::) annotation), AvoGuid (UUID wrapper), AvoUtils (ISO8601 date formatting with en_US_POSIX locale), AvoAnonymousId (NSLock-based thread safety replacing @synchronized, storage key AvoInspectorAnonymousId preserved). Delete corresponding ObjC files.
acceptanceCriteria: AvoStorage protocol has @objc(setItem::) annotation on setItem method
AvoAnonymousId uses NSLock for thread safety
Storage key AvoInspectorAnonymousId is preserved
AvoUtils.currentTimeAsISO8601UTCString() uses en_US_POSIX locale and UTC timezone
No ObjC utility files remain
swift build succeeds

stories.title: Schema Extraction and Deduplication
stories.description: Migrate AvoSchemaExtractor with careful type detection: CFBooleanGetTypeID check before NSNumber, objCType-based int/float detection (only i/s/q for int, no l), NSNull/String/Array/Set/Dictionary handling, non-string key support. Migrate AvoDeduplicator with serial DispatchQueue replacing @synchronized, static let singleton, and 0.3-second stale event threshold.
acceptanceCriteria: Boolean detection uses CFGetTypeID(obj as CFTypeRef) == CFBooleanGetTypeID() before NSNumber check
objCType mapping: i/s/q -> AvoInt; c -> AvoString; d/f and other -> AvoFloat
No l (long) in AvoInt mapping
Empty nested dictionaries produce AvoObject with empty fields
AvoDeduplicator uses serial DispatchQueue for synchronized access
clearOldEvents uses 0.3-second threshold
swift build succeeds

stories.title: Encryption (CryptoKit + v0x01 Wire Format)
stories.description: Complete rewrite of AvoEncryption using CryptoKit. Implements v0x01 wire format: version byte 0x01, 65-byte ephemeral EC public key (uncompressed), 12-byte nonce, 16-byte auth tag, N-byte ciphertext. Uses SecKey for EC operations (key generation, ECDH, import/export) and CryptoKit AES.GCM.seal for encryption. SHA256 KDF via CryptoKit. Preserves secp256r1 compressed key decompression with big-number arithmetic. Eliminates all CommonCrypto references.
acceptanceCriteria: import CryptoKit present, no CommonCrypto anywhere in Sources/
Version byte is 0x01
Nonce is 12 bytes (CryptoKit AES.GCM.Nonce)
Wire format: [0x01][65-byte pubkey][12-byte nonce][16-byte tag][ciphertext]
KDF is SHA256(shared_secret) via CryptoKit
Compressed key decompression preserves secp256r1 curve math
encrypt() returns nil for nil/empty inputs
swift build succeeds

stories.title: Networking, Batching, and Event Validation
stories.description: Migrate AvoNetworkCallsHandler (completion-handler networking, encryption integration, sampling), AvoBatcher (event batching with NSUserDefaults persistence, 1000-event cap, background/foreground), AvoEventValidator (ReDoS protection with isPatternPotentiallyDangerous and safeNumberOfMatches using shared static serial queue and semaphore timeout), AvoEventSpecFetcher (semaphore-based sync requests with deadlock prevention), AvoEventSpecCache (NSLock-based LRU cache), and AvoEventSpecFetchTypes (all wire/internal types with field mappings). Delete corresponding ObjC files.
acceptanceCriteria: Storage keys AvoBatcherSuiteKey and AvoBatcherCacheKey preserved in AvoBatcher
Event cap of 1000 preserved
safeNumberOfMatches dispatches onto static serial queue com.avo.inspector.regex with DispatchSemaphore timeout
isPatternPotentiallyDangerous checks for nested quantifiers
AvoEventSpecFetcher uses semaphore-based sync request with dispatchPrecondition(condition: .notOnQueue(.main))
AvoEventSpecCache uses NSLock for thread safety
No async/await or Combine imports
swift build succeeds
stories.testPattern: BatchingTests, NetworkCallsHandlerTests, SamplingTests, AvoEventValidatorTests, AvoEventSpecFetcherTests, AvoEventSpecCacheTests (Stories 8, 9, 10)

stories.title: Main Inspector Class and ObjC File Cleanup
stories.description: Migrate the main AvoInspector class including AvoInspectorEnv enum (prod=0, dev=1, staging=2), AvoVisualInspectorType enum with @objc(Bar) and @objc(Bubble) case annotations, Inspector protocol conforming to NSObjectProtocol, AvoStorageImpl private class using UserDefaults.standard, all public initializers including init(apiKey:envInt:) with uintValue and .dev fallback, the complete fetch-validate-send flow (fetchAndValidateAsync, handleBranchChangeAndCache with NSLock, sendEventWithValidation), conditional initialization of eventSpecFetcher/eventSpecCache, commented-out notification observers, internal dependency injection seams for testing, and libVersion 4.0.0. Delete all remaining ObjC files and include/ directory.
acceptanceCriteria: AvoInspectorEnv raw values: prod=0, dev=1, staging=2
AvoVisualInspectorType has @objc(Bar) and @objc(Bubble) case annotations
Inspector protocol conforms to NSObjectProtocol
AvoStorageImpl is private, uses UserDefaults.standard
init(apiKey:envInt:) uses uintValue with .dev fallback
eventSpecFetchTimeout constant is 5.0
Conditional initialization of eventSpecFetcher/eventSpecCache based on publicEncryptionKey, env, and streamId
handleBranchChangeAndCache uses NSLock or objc_sync for thread safety
addObservers notification registrations remain commented out
libVersion is 4.0.0
find Sources/AvoInspector -name *.h -o -name *.m returns zero results
find Sources/AvoInspector -type d -name include -o -name types returns zero results
swift build succeeds
stories.testPattern: InitializationTests, TrackTests, LogsTests, SessionTests, SessionBetweenRestartsTests, EnvironmentMappingTests (Stories 7, 8)

stories.title: Port SPM Test Files -- Schema and Core Tests

Create test directory structure Tests/AvoInspectorTests/. Delete all existing ObjC test files. Create test doubles (MockNetworkCallsHandler, MockBatcher, MockStorage). Add Bool/char objCType tests (review issue 1.1), AvoObject.name() guard fallback test (review issue 3.1), nondeterministic iteration order handling (review issue 3.2), behavioral parity tests for NSNumber subclasses and single-element collections, and test_initWithEnvInt_mapsToCorrectEnv.

No .m files remain in Tests/

Bool/char test: NSNumber(value: true) -> AvoBoolean, NSNumber(value: Int8(65)) -> AvoString
AvoObject.name() guard fallback test: non-AvoEventSchemaType value in fields is skipped without crash
Nondeterministic iteration order handled via single-element collections or set-based assertions

stories.title: Port SPM Test Files -- Track, Batching, Session, Sampling
stories.description: Port remaining 6 SPM repo test files: TrackTests, BatchingTests, NetworkCallsHandlerTests, SamplingTests, SessionTests, SessionBetweenRestartsTests. Includes MockNetworkCallsHandler, MockBatcher, MockEventSpecFetcher, MockEventSpecCache test doubles. TrackTests includes all 7 validation flow test cases: cache hit with valid spec sends validated event, cache hit with nil spec falls through to batcher, cache miss with fetch success sends validated event, cache miss with fetch failure falls through, branch change clears cache, no-fetcher falls through, and avoFunctionEventId extraction.

MockNetworkCallsHandler captures callInspectorWithBatchBody and reportValidatedEvent calls
MockBatcher captures handleTrackSchema calls
TrackTests includes all 7 validation flow test cases

stories.title: Port Cocoapods-Only Test Files
stories.description: Port 4 cocoapods-only test files (non-encryption) from /Users/alexverein/code/avo/ios-avo-inspector/Example/Tests/: AvoAnonymousIdTests, AvoEventSpecCacheTests, AvoEventSpecFetcherTests, AvoEventValidatorTests. AvoEventValidatorTests includes all 6 ReDoS protection tests: dangerous pattern detection for nested quantifiers, safe pattern acceptance, correct match count, NSNotFound on timeout (0.001s), fail-open behavior, and concurrent safeNumberOfMatches (50 iterations with 0.5s timeout per review issue 4.1). Selector name change for safeNumberOfMatches acknowledged per review issue 1.2.

test_safeNumberOfMatches_returnsCorrectCount verifies count of 2 for [0-9]+ in abc 123 def 456

stories.title: Port Encryption Test Files
stories.description: Port 2 encryption test files from cocoapods (/Users/alexverein/code/avo/ios-avo-inspector/Example/Tests/AvoEncryptionTests.m and AvoEncryptionIntegrationTests.m), updated for v0x01 wire format. Test decryption helper uses CryptoKit (SHA256.hash for KDF, AES.GCM.open for decryption). Wire format validation: version byte 0x01, 12-byte nonce at offset 66, auth tag at offset 78, ciphertext at offset 94, minimum 95 bytes. Round-trip tests for string/integer/double/boolean values. Compressed key decompression round-trip test. Port generateTestPrivateKey() and publicKeyHexFromPrivateKey(_:) helpers.

Test decryption helper checks version byte 0x01
Wire format offsets: pubkey [1,66), nonce [66,78), tag [78,94), ciphertext [94,...)
Round-trip test: decrypt(encrypt(hello), privateKey) == hello
Compressed key decompression round-trip test exists
generateTestPrivateKey() and publicKeyHexFromPrivateKey(_:) helpers ported
swift test passes for these test files
stories.testPattern: CryptoKit-based test decryption helper, SecKey test key generation

stories.title: Thread Safety Tests
stories.description: Create 3 new thread-safety test files validating NSLock/serial-queue replacements for @synchronized. Uses DispatchQueue.concurrentPerform with 50-100 iterations. AvoAnonymousIdThreadSafetyTests: concurrent get returns consistent value, concurrent set/get doesn't crash, concurrent clear/get doesn't crash. AvoDeduplicatorThreadSafetyTests: concurrent shouldRegisterEvent doesn't crash, concurrent clearOldEvents interleaved doesn't crash. AvoEventSpecCacheThreadSafetyTests: concurrent get/set/contains doesn't crash, concurrent clear/set doesn't crash. Final validation that total test file count is exactly 23.
acceptanceCriteria: 3 Swift test files created
AvoAnonymousIdThreadSafetyTests: concurrent access returns consistent value, concurrent set/get doesnt crash, concurrent clear/get doesnt crash
AvoDeduplicatorThreadSafetyTests: concurrent shouldRegisterEvent doesnt crash, concurrent clearOldEvents interleaved doesnt crash
AvoEventSpecCacheThreadSafetyTests: concurrent get/set/contains doesnt crash, concurrent clear/set doesnt crash
All tests use DispatchQueue.concurrentPerform with 50+ iterations
swift test passes for these test files
Total test file count: find Tests/AvoInspectorTests -name *.swift | wc -l returns exactly 23
stories.testPattern: Concurrent access via DispatchQueue.concurrentPerform, pass = no crash/hang
